recommendations.title: I Spit on Your Grave
recommendations.overview: A beautiful woman from the city, Jennifer Hills, rents an isolated cabin in the country to write her latest novel. Soon, a group of local lowlifes subject her to a nightmare of degradation, rape, and violence.

recommendations.title: House of 9
recommendations.overview: Nine strangers wake up in a house with no recollection how they got there and no way out. The voice on the PA introduces them to a grisly game they must play. The prize is $5 million and their life.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Molly Hartley
recommendations.overview: Accused of murder and confined to a mental institution, Molly Hartley falls under the possession of a powerful demonic force. As she undergoes a monstrous transformation, a defrocked priest is her only hope of salvation.

recommendations.title: Carlito's Way
recommendations.overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

recommendations.title: Shutter
recommendations.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.

recommendations.title: A Sacrifice
recommendations.overview: American social psychologist Ben Monroe investigates a local cult connected to a disturbing event. While he immerses himself into his work, his rebellious teenage daughter, Mazzy, gets involved with a mysterious local boy, who introduces her to the c

recommendations.title: Don't Hang Up
recommendations.overview: An evening of drunken prank calls becomes a nightmare for a pair of teenagers when a mysterious stranger turns their own game against them.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: The life of Al Roberts, a pianist in a New York nightclub, turns into a nightmare when he decides to hitchhike to Los Angeles to visit his girlfriend.
